parsing_rationale: The source document is not a functional specification but rather a 'Quality Checklist' designed to validate a specification. Since the prompt requires the output to be a 'spec' doc type, I have extracted the implied goals (validation, completeness, testability) as requirements. However, because the document contains no actual business logic, features, or functional requirements for the 'CourseHub API' itself, there are massive structural gaps regarding the actual specification content.

project_info.brief_explanation: Validation checklist to ensure the CourseHub API specification meets quality and completeness standards.
project_info.source_context: Quality Assurance Checklist for Specification Readiness

sections.title: Specification Quality Checklist: CourseHub API
sections.raw_content:
**Purpose**: Validate that the CourseHub API specification is complete, testable, and ready for planning.
**Created**: 2026-06-27
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

sections.title: Content Quality
sections.raw_content:
- [x] No implementation details (languages, frameworks, APIs) are exposed in the feature definition.
- [x] The specification focuses on user value and business needs.
- [x] The content is written for non-technical stakeholders as well as delivery teams.
- [x] All mandatory sections are completed.

sections.title: Requirement Completeness
sections.raw_content:
- [x] No [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] markers remain.
- [x] Requirements are testable and unambiguous.
- [x] Success criteria are measurable.
- [x] Success criteria are technology-agnostic.
- [x] Acceptance scenarios are defined for primary user flows.
- [x] Edge cases are identified.
- [x] Scope is clearly bounded.
- [x] Dependencies and assumptions are identified.

sections.title: Feature Readiness
sections.raw_content:
- [x] All functional requirements have clear acceptance criteria.
- [x] User scenarios cover the primary flows.
- [x] The feature is aligned with the measurable outcomes defined in Success Criteria.
- [x] The specification avoids implementation detail leakage.

sections.title: Notes
sections.raw_content: - All checklist items are complete and the specification is ready to proceed to planning.

elements.content: Validate that the CourseHub API specification is complete, testable, and ready for planning.
No implementation details (languages, frameworks, APIs) are exposed in the feature definition.
Requirements must be testable, unambiguous, and success criteria must be measurable and technology-agnostic.
Scope must be clearly bounded with identified dependencies and assumptions.

structural_gaps.remediation_advice: The document is a checklist, not a spec. The actual functional requirements of the CourseHub API are missing and must be provided.
Define the functional boundaries of the API.
List pending technical or business questions regarding the API.
